example: Please **enter** the classroom quietly before the bell rings.
The **entry** to our school is very beautiful with many flowers.
I need an **eraser** to correct my mistakes in homework.
These **erasers** are in different colors and shapes.
I like all subjects, **especially** English and Maths.
One **euro** is about seven Chinese yuan.
I usually do my homework in the **evening** after dinner.
On school **evenings**, I study for about two hours.
Our school will hold a sports **event** next month.
There are many interesting **events** at our school festival.
**Everybody** in our class enjoys the school trip.
**Everyone** should wear school uniforms on Monday.
I like **everything** about my new school.
Please write **everyone** correctly in your homework.
This is a good **example** of how to write an English letter.
The teacher gives us many **examples** to help us understand.
There are some **exceptions** to this grammar rule.
I am very **excited** about the coming school trip.
The football match is very **exciting** to watch.
We use an **exclamation** mark to show strong feelings.
We do morning **exercise** every day at school.
These English **exercises** help us learn better.
Our school **exists** to help students learn and grow.
I **expect** to see my friends at school tomorrow.
This school bag is too **expensive** for me to buy.
We use words to **express** our ideas and feelings.
Learning English **expressions** is very useful.
We use our **eyes** to read books and watch the blackboard.
She has a happy **face** when she gets good grades.
It is a **fact** that reading helps us learn new words.
We learn many interesting **facts** in science class.
Please check the spelling of words carefully.
Our teacher is **fair** to every student in the class.
This answer is **false**. The correct answer is B.
Please check your spelling before writing.
Many **families** come to our school Open Day.
I love my **family** very much.
Always write clearly and carefully.
Our school has a **famous** library with many books.
We visited a **farm** and saw many animals last week.
The school **fashion** show is very popular among students.
He runs very **fast** in the school sports meeting.
My **father** takes me to school every morning.
English is my **favourite** subject at school.
Don't **fear** making mistakes when learning English.
A good **feature** of our school is the big playground.
Our school has many great **features** like a library and labs.
School starts in **February** after the winter holiday.
I **feel** happy when I am with my classmates.
I have a good **feeling** about today's exam.
